description_long: This object is a vintage-style television set with a boxy, rectangular wooden cabinet and four tapered legs, giving it a mid-century modern appearance. The front features a prominent glass screen displaying a pixelated video game scene, flanked by a black speaker grille on the left and a set of rotary control knobs on the right. A long, thin metal antenna extends diagonally from the top, suggesting analog signal reception. The sides and top are finished in a brown wood-like material, while the back is mostly black with a protruding panel and a visible power cord. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with clear retro influences and functional details. This television would likely be found in a residential or retro-themed urban setting.
description: A retro, boxy television with a wood-finished cabinet, glass screen, black speaker grille, rotary knobs, and a long metal antenna.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the black back panel, protruding section, power cord, and the antenna extending from the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brown wood-like finish and the angled antenna, with one leg visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the glass screen with a video game scene, black speaker grille, rotary knobs, and the antenna.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the brown wood-like finish, a small rear knob, and the antenna's attachment point.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, black plastic bezel with a matte finish and integrated speaker grille on the left
attribute_control_button_layout: cluster of rotary knobs and buttons on the front right edge
